data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Delivery status tracking' as part of the SMS Reminder System. However, the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for delivery status tracking, but without specific evidence of its implementation, it is clear that there is a gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or operational status of delivery status tracking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for delivery status tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete API reads or state checks that confirm delivery status tracking functionality.
